title: Rainbow Outline
description: The outline of selected blocks will turn rainbow-colored!
body:
# Description
The outline of selected blocks will turn rainbow-colored!

## Expected effects
Outlines that were difficult to see in vanilla, such as black concrete and obsidian, become much easier to see!
### Black Concrete
![Black Concrete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1708365456d1f3a3d18a6a46fc58156af0727506_0.webp)
### Obsidian![Obsidian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e77f5c3bcd45715d3ba5289852e363d868808f8.png)
****_If you look at the gallery, you'll see that it's not a light blue outline._****
